title: grammitis asthenophylla
intro: Grammitis asthenophylla, also known as the brittle-leaved Grammitis, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Grammitis asthenophylla include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or decoction, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
